Zero Hunger.reason: The course explicitly covers "農業與畜牧特殊課題" (Special topics in agriculture and animal husbandry), linking directly to sustainable food production systems and rural development (Targets 2.3, 2.4).
evidence: 鄉間發展中農業與畜牧所涉及特殊面向的考量與處理

Quality Education.reason: The course itself provides education on sustainable development by teaching students to analyze "地方創生" (Place Making) cases, directly aligning with the knowledge and skills promoted in Target 4.7.

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's focus on "鄉間規劃" (rural planning) and "空間計畫" (spatial planning) relates to developing sustainable infrastructure and supporting local enterprises (Targets 9.1, 9.3).

Life Below Water.reason: The curriculum includes "里海" (Satoumi), a concept focused on the sustainable management and protection of coastal marine ecosystems, directly relevant to Target 14.2.

Life on Land.reason: The course strongly focuses on terrestrial ecosystems through topics like "里山" (Satoyama), "人與自然生態" (People and natural ecology), and "地景維護" (Landscape maintenance), aligning with Targets 15.1 and 15.9.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course analyzes "地方創生推動政策" (Place Making promotion policy) and indigenous issues, relating to inclusive decision-making and non-discriminatory policies (Targets 16.7, 16.b).
